headline: Inspect peas today — Monday storms could wash out Bt
weather_notes: Today 74°F and sunny (0% rain) is the cleanest window this week to inspect peas and apply Bt before storm risk arrives.
Monday brings 44% chance of showers and thunderstorms — Bt applied today or Sunday gets two full dry days to activate.
Overnight lows hold 42–53°F through the week — no frost risk for newly sown strawberries (w1) or onions (w4).
If Monday rain arrives, hold irrigation on w1 and w4 — newly sown beds won't need water mid-week.

surfaced_tasks.title: Inspect for aphids — apply Bt if caterpillars present
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due May 7 and today's dry window is the last clean Bt application opportunity before Monday's 44% storm risk.
